text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't talk to me. I'm just starting my final check.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now all I've gotta do is run the program and show
off my code.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I know. Keep your eyes on the prize.
